name: dissertation-research
description: Project-specific workflows for reproducible dissertation harness experiments, session orientation, and research-state closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Repeatable harness experiments and session memory
interface.longDescription: Project-specific Codex workflows for the training-free multi-agent epilepsy extraction dissertation. Provides a research-harness skill plus slash commands for orienting a session, running fixed-budget harness experiments, and closing out with project-state updates.
defaultPrompt: Orient on the current dissertation project state
Run a paired fixed-budget harness experiment
Close out this session with project-state updates
